mapper.select: SELECT permission_id, permission_name, permission_code, description, create_time FROM permissions ORDER BY permission_id ASC

SELECT p.permission_id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.description, p.create_time FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.permission_id ASC
